title: Ensure a log monitoring and alerts are set up for Management  Console sign-in without MFA

input_row.title: Ensure a log monitoring and alerts are set up for Management  Console sign-in without MFA
input_row.description: Real-time monitoring of API calls can be achieved by directing ActionTrail Logs to Log Service and establishing corresponding query and alarms. It is recommended that a query and alarm be established for console logins that are not protected by multi-factor authentication (MFA).
input_row.rationale: Monitoring for single-factor console logins will increase visibility into accounts that are not protected by MFA.
input_row.audit: Perform the following steps to ensure log monitoring and alerts are set for Management Console sign-in without MFA. 1. Logon to SLS Console. 2. Click Log Service Audit Service in the navigation pane to go to the Log Service Audit Service page. 3. Ensure the Action Trail are Enabled under the Access to Cloud Products > Global Configuration page, and click Central Project. 4. Select Alerts. 5. Ensure below alert rule has been enabled and saved in the target actiontrail_log "event.eventName": ConsoleSignin and "addionalEventData.loginAccount": false
input_row.remediation: Perform the following to ensure the log monitoring and alerts are set up for Management Console sign-in without MFA: 1. Logon to SLS Console. 2. Click Log Service Audit Service in the navigation pane. 3. Go to Access to Cloud Products > Global Configuration page. a. Select a location of project for logs. 87 | P a g e b. Check the Action Trail and configure a proper days. c. Click Save to save the changes. 4. Go to Access to Cloud Products > Global Configurations click Central Project. 5. Select Log Management > Actiontrail Log. 6. In the search/analytics console, input below query "event.eventName": ConsoleSignin and "addionalEventData.loginAccount": false 7. Create a dashboard and set alert for the query result.
input_row.default_value: The monitoring dashboard and alert is not set by default.

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Manual

**MANUAL STEPS:**
1. Log in to the Alibaba Cloud Console.
2. Navigate to the "Log Service" section by clicking on "Log Service Audit Service" in the navigation pane.
3. Once in the Log Service, go to "Access to Cloud Products" > "Global Configuration" page.
4. Verify that the Action Trail is enabled and configured with an appropriate retention period for logs.
5. Click on "Central Project".
6. Go to "Log Management" > "Actiontrail Log".
7. In the search/analytics console, input the following query: 
   - `"event.eventName": ConsoleSignin and "addionalEventData.loginAccount": false`.
8. Check if an alert rule is enabled for this query. Create a dashboard if it isn’t already set up.
9. Ensure you save any changes made during the verification.

**What to verify/validate:** Ensure that log monitoring and alerts are configured to detect Management Console sign-ins that are not protected by MFA.

**Expected secure configuration:** 
- Action Trail should be enabled.
- The log query for console logins without MFA should be set up correctly, and an alert should be active.

**How to confirm compliance:** 
- If the log monitoring dashboard is set up and alerts are configured effectively according to the steps above, then compliance is confirmed. If any of these steps are not properly configured, the control is non-compliant.
